title: carduus spinulosus subsp. lobulatus
intro: Carduus spinulosus subsp. lobulatus, also known as thistle or artichoke thistle, is a subspecies of the Carduus spinulosus plant, a thistle native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Consuming Carduus spinulosus subsp. lobulatus has been associated with various health benefits, such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Carduus spinulosus subsp. lobulatus can be found in the form of tea, tincture, and capsule supplements, typically used to support overall well-being and alleviate digestive issues.
